_source: India migration 2026-06-03 — Dual Momentum sleeves for NSE

equity._fallback_note: Nifty 50 and Nifty Next 50 ETFs — broad Indian equity market exposure.
equity._min_aum_inr_note: ₹1000 crore (₹10 billion). Top-tier NSE ETFs by AUM.

treasury._fallback_note: Indian Gilt / Liquid ETFs as the safe-haven / cash-equivalent sleeve. LIQUIDBEES tracks overnight rates (CBLO/Repo). Equivalent role to TLT/IEF in the US sleeve.

_classifier_note: If Kite Connect asset attributes do not include sleeve-specific tags, use the fallback_classifier_allowlist. LIQUIDBEES pays daily dividends (reinvested as units) — strategy must handle fractional payout units.
